name: os_linux_rhel_gt_or_eq_9_and_package_logrotate
bash_conditional: ( grep -qP "^ID=[\"']?rhel[\"']?$" "/etc/os-release" && { real="$(grep -P "^VERSION_ID=[\"']?[\w.]+[\"']?$" /etc/os-release | sed "s/^VERSION_ID=[\"']\?\([^\"']\+\)[\"']\?$/\1/")"; expected="9"; printf "%s\n%s" "$expected" "$real" | sort -VC; } && rpm --quiet -q logrotate )
ansible_conditional: ( ansible_distribution == 'RedHat' and ansible_distribution_version is version('9', '>=') and "logrotate" in ansible_facts.packages )
